assertions.title: Real-time data flows via WebSocket

steps.action: Open app at localhost:3102 and observe runtime traffic
steps.expected: WebSocket connection to localhost:3101 is established and inbound messages are visible in-session
steps.observed: Frequent HTTP polling to localhost:3100 was visible; no ws://localhost:3101 requests were captured in network request log

steps.action: Run in-page WebSocket probe to ws://localhost:3101
steps.expected: Connection opens and messages are received
steps.observed: Probe connected successfully (connected=true) but received zero messages during 7s observation

steps.action: Check UI indicators tied to real-time stream
steps.observed: Transactions section remained 'No recent transactions' and chart area reported data load failure

evidence.consoleErrors: Repeated 429 Too Many Requests errors during observation
evidence.network: No ws://localhost:3101 entries captured via agent-browser request log; in-page WS probe file shows connected=true with messages=[]

assertions.issues: Could not observe required in-session WebSocket message receipt despite successful socket handshake; concurrent API 429 responses likely impacted live-data validation.

assertions.title: Chart displays historical data and live updates

steps.action: Load token page and inspect chart area
steps.observed: Chart pane displayed: 'Unable to load chart data. Check that the API is running.'

steps.action: Run explicit observation window (~70s) between start/end captures
steps.expected: Live chart updates appear over time
steps.observed: No chart rendering or live updates became visible; state remained unchanged

steps.expected: Candles endpoint returns historical candle array
steps.observed: Observation JSON captured RATE_LIMITED responses from candles API and no chart canvas rendered

evidence.consoleErrors: Repeated 429 Too Many Requests during observation window
evidence.network: Frequent GET polling to /depth, /market, /candles with repeated rate-limit symptoms; chart UI stayed in failure state

assertions.issues: Validation blocked by backend/API rate limiting (429), preventing historical chart load and any observable live update behavior.

assertions.title: Balances display correctly when wallet is connected

steps.expected: Wallet connect flow opens with available Aptos options
steps.observed: Modal opened with Aptos/Solana/Ethereum tabs and install links for Petra/Nightly/Backpack

steps.expected: Wallet connects and balance values appear in swap inputs
steps.observed: Aptos option remained on install-only path in headless environment; no extension/session credential available to complete connection

steps.action: Open Petra install link from modal
steps.expected: If not installed, install flow is reachable
steps.observed: Navigated to Chrome Web Store Petra page, confirming missing wallet extension dependency

evidence.consoleErrors: Console included ongoing 429 errors from background API polling
evidence.network: Wallet modal exposed install links; connection could not proceed to authenticated wallet state in headless run

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing wallet extension/credentials in headless environment; balance assertion requires successful wallet connection first.

frictions.description: API polling quickly hit rate limits (429), producing noisy console errors and preventing stable functional-read validation.
frictions.resolution: Retried with reload and cooldown window; issue persisted.

frictions.description: Wallet connection in headless browser required extension installation/real credentials not available in this isolation context.
frictions.resolution: Validated modal/installation path only; could not complete connected-wallet state.

blockers.description: Rate-limited API responses (429) repeatedly blocked chart and market data reliability during observation windows.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Cleared logs, reloaded page, observed cooldown window, reopened fresh browser session; failures remained.

blockers.description: No usable wallet extension/account in the headless environment to complete Aptos wallet connection and reveal balances.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Opened wallet modal, selected Aptos flow, followed Petra install link; connection still unavailable without extension/account provisioning.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 3 blocked. FUNC-003 blocked due missing observable WS messages in-session despite socket handshake, FUNC-004 blocked by chart API rate-limiting/data load failure, and FUNC-005 blocked by unavailable wallet extension/credentials in headless environment.
